# sdwan_application_priority_policy_settings_policy (Resource)

This resource can manage a Application Priority Policy Settings Policy.
  - Minimum SD-WAN Manager version: `20.15.1`

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sdwan_application_priority_policy_settings_policy" "example" {
  name                        = "Example"
  description                 = "My Example"
  feature_profile_id          = "f6dd22c8-0b4f-496c-9a0b-6813d1f8b8ac"
  ipv4_application_visibility = true
  ipv4_flow_visibility        = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `feature_profile_id` (String) Feature Profile ID
- `name` (String) The name of the Policy

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Policy
- `ipv4_application_visibility` (Boolean) Application Visibility
  - Default value: `false`
- `ipv4_flow_visibility` (Boolean) Flow Visibility
  - Default value: `false`
- `ipv6_application_visibility` (Boolean) Application Visibility IPv6
  - Default value: `false`
- `ipv6_flow_visibility` (Boolean) Flow Visibility IPv6
  - Default value: `false`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the Policy
- `version` (Number) The version of the Policy

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Expected import identifier with the format: "application_priority_policy_settings_policy_id,feature_profile_id"
terraform import sdwan_application_priority_policy_settings_policy.example "f6b2c44c-693c-4763-b010-895aa3d236bd,f6dd22c8-0b4f-496c-9a0b-6813d1f8b8ac"
```
